message:
Merge pull request #1594 from kubestellar/cncf-mission/coredns-7177-pr-6898-unexpectedly-breaks-creation-of-ptr-records

🌱 coredns: PR #6898 unexpectedly breaks creation of PTR records

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,80 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "coredns-7177-pr-6898-unexpectedly-breaks-creation-of-ptr-records",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "coredns: PR #6898 unexpectedly breaks creation of PTR records",
+    "description": "PR #6898 unexpectedly breaks creation of PTR records. Community-reported issue.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify coredns troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your coredns deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n coredns -l app.kubernetes.io/name=coredns\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=coredns -n coredns --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review coredns configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant coredns configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n coredns -l app.kubernetes.io/name=coredns\nkubectl get configmap -n coredns -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=coredns\n```\n**What happened**:\nI have a single headless service associated to a deployment. Each pod in the deployment has two containers. One container is responsible for serving incoming gRPC requests (some compute heavy task)."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for PR #6898 unexpectedly breaks creation of PTR records",
+        "description": "Pedantry trigger alert :). Stop reading if pedantry makes you want to punch me.\n\nRelevant spec is here: https://github.com/kubernetes/dns/blob/master/docs/specification.md#243---ptr-records\n\nwhere:\n\nWe just always used the IP as the identifier...almost always anyway. But it's not strictly necessary\n```yaml\nroot@adrian:/# dig +short -x  10.244.0.29\ndummy-sts-0.headless-svc-sts.default.svc.cluster.local.\n10-244-0-29.headless-svc-sts-0.default.svc.cluster.local.\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm PR #6898 unexpectedly breaks creation of PTR… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=coredns -n coredns --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n coredns --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Pedantry trigger alert :). Stop reading if pedantry makes you want to punch me.\n\nRelevant spec is here: https://github.com/kubernetes/dns/blob/master/docs/specification.md#243---ptr-records\n\nwhere:\n\nWe just always used the IP as the identifier...almost always anyway. But it's not strictly necessary and I seem to recall sometimes we don't.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "root@adrian:/# dig +short -x  10.244.0.29\ndummy-sts-0.headless-svc-sts.default.svc.cluster.local.\n10-244-0-29.headless-svc-sts-0.default.svc.cluster.local.",
+        "root@adrian:/# dig +short -x  10.244.0.29\ndummy-sts-0.headless-svc-sts.default.svc.cluster.local.",
+        "root@adrian:/# dig +short -x 10.244.0.22\n10-244-0-22.headless-svc.default.svc.cluster.local."
+      ]
+    }
+  },
